name: beacon
description: Slack Code Intelligence Bot — answer questions across GitHub repos using a pre-built tree-sitter + vector index on Cloudflare.

scripts.db:local:init: wrangler d1 execute scintel --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=packages/shared/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute scintel --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=packages/shared/migrations/0004_tenants.sql && wrangler d1 execute scintel --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=packages/shared/migrations/0005_tenant_ci_triage_runs.sql
scripts.db:local:migrate: wrangler d1 execute scintel --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=packages/shared/migrations/0004_tenants.sql && wrangler d1 execute scintel --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=packages/shared/migrations/0005_tenant_ci_triage_runs.sql
scripts.dry-run: npm run dry-run --workspace workers/github-webhook && npm run dry-run --workspace workers/slack-bot
